recent_calls.summary: The user called Budget and inquired about the next steps after receiving an estimate related to the HSA. The agent acknowledged the query and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called Budget and provided two ZIP codes, but the first was not in the service area. The user then requested to speak with Dan Lagarth, but the call ended shortly after without further interaction.

Antoinette Moore called to schedule an AC checkup as a renter at 539 Dornoch Drive, Saint Louis, Missouri. The agent confirmed the details, offered available time slots, and successfully booked the appointment for May 25th at 12 PM. The user provided feedback rating the experience as a four and suggested the agent slow down a bit during the conversation.
The user called to return a call to Nicole but reached an AI agent named Sophie. The AI agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to complain about a plumbing issue involving confusion between Budget and American Home Shield services. The user expressed frustration over a plumber who allegedly caused more problems and charged extra money. The agent acknowledged the complaint and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to cancel their appointment scheduled for Wednesday, May 27, 2026. The agent confirmed the cancellation request multiple times and assured the user that the cancellation would be processed and followed up by the team. The call ended with the user being transferred to a live representative as requested.

Rick Lang called to schedule a technician visit to assess and recharge his cooling system due to a possible refrigerant leak identified during a previous semiannual visit. The appointment was successfully booked for May 27th at 12 PM. The agent confirmed the details and informed Rick about the dispatch fee and upcoming confirmation call.

The user called to inquire about the results of refrigerant line work done on their AC unit. The agent informed the user that they would pass the request to the team for a follow-up with the results and any next steps. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further requests.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was completed successfully within a short call duration.
The user requested to speak with Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to follow up on a furnace leak issue as no one had returned their previous call. The agent apologized for the lack of response and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.
The agent asked the user for their service address ZIP code to proceed, but the user refused to provide it and ended the call abruptly. No service or information was exchanged.

The user called to schedule AC service related to a home warranty and identified as the homeowner needing cooling service. The user became frustrated and requested immediate assistance, leading the agent to transfer the call to a live agent for further help.

The user called to schedule work related to their home warranty and HVAC. The agent attempted to gather more details but the user requested customer service, leading to a transfer to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to be connected to the billing department, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the billing team. The transfer was successful without any issues.

The user called to schedule an appointment for cooling service related to Foam Shield and mentioned they already have an appointment. The agent attempted to gather more details but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent as requested by the user.

The user called to schedule a technician visit for a cooling system issue where the condenser is not running, requesting service any time after 3 PM due to tenant availability. The agent confirmed the details, including the home warranty dispatch number, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would follow up. The user declined information about maintenance programs and providing feedback.
The user was initially speaking but was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 12 seconds and ended with a successful transfer to another number.
The user called to inquire about a home warranty and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, facilitated the transfer without any issues.

Belva called to schedule a routine annual checkup for her central air and humidifier filter cleaning through the Budget Savings Club. The agent confirmed the details and booked an appointment for Tuesday, May 26th at 12:00 PM. The call concluded with the user declining to provide feedback but expressing thanks.

The user called to confirm the time of their air conditioning appointment. The agent verified the user's phone number and confirmed the appointment with technician Patrick scheduled between 2:30 and 3:30 PM. The user did not request any further assistance and ended the call politely.
The user requested a callback to be connected with a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another number. The agent promptly facilitated the transfer without any issues.
The user called to request a receipt for a previous transaction. The agent apologized for not having direct access to billing information and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.

The agent Sophie identified the caller as Cherry Donaldson, who had received a call from Budget. Sophie then proceeded to transfer the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The call was very brief with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Patricia from American Home Shield called Budget to inquire about rescheduling a customer's HVAC service appointment originally set for the 28th. The agent informed Patricia that they cannot reschedule directly but will forward the request to the appropriate team for follow-up. The call ended with no further requests from Patricia.
The user requested to be connected to a representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call to a live agent.

The user called to schedule a service appointment for their home air conditioner, which is not working, under their American Home Shield home warranty. The agent collected all necessary details including the dispatch number, service address, and contact information, and confirmed the request. The user declined additional information about home maintenance programs and ended the call.

The user called to inquire about the timing of a visit to their house and provided their name, but the agent was unable to verify the appointment and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to inquire if the agent was a Mister Cool distributor. The agent clarified they are not a distributor but offer service and installation for various HVAC brands. The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred.
The user called to follow up on an appointment scheduled for 8 AM. The agent verified the user's ZIP code and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to check if their air conditioning appointment was scheduled but no appointment was found under their information. The agent confirmed the user's details and then transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance.

The user briefly requested to speak with five agents, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent who could assist further. The call was successfully transferred without additional conversation.
The user called to reach Amy, but the agent informed them that Amy was unavailable and offered assistance with Budget services. The call ended shortly after without further requests from the user.
The user briefly mentioned 'Five agents,' and the agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent for further assistance. The call was then successfully transferred to another agent.

The user called about a clogged sink and indicated it was an emergency needing immediate attention. The agent attempted to gather more details about the urgency and damage caused by the issue. The call ended abruptly before resolution.
The user requested to speak to a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Nancy called to schedule an inspection appointment for her heating, cooling, and plumbing systems after a recent replacement. The agent booked her for the earliest available slot on the same day at 4 PM and confirmed the details. Nancy was satisfied with the service and gave a five-star rating, citing convenience as the highlight.
The user requested to speak with a live agent regarding plumbing. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate live agent.
The user requested to speak with a service manager, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user, Peggy Fuehner, called to schedule a plumbing service for a clogged kitchen sink and requested the earliest available appointment for the next day. The agent collected all necessary information, including contact details and service address, and noted the user's interest in home maintenance program information. The call ended with the user providing neutral feedback and no further requests.

Benjamin called to report a plumbing leak under his kitchen sink or garbage disposal and requested a service appointment for either Friday or Monday. The agent documented the issue and the preferred timing, informing Benjamin that a team member would follow up on the next business day to schedule the service. The call ended with no further requests from Benjamin.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could help, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself but no further interaction from the user before the call ended.

The user called to report that no one showed up for their appointment today. The agent apologized and explained that since it was after-hours, they could not reach the team immediately but would pass the message on the next business day. The call ended abruptly before the agent could confirm further details.

The user called after hours requesting to speak with a live representative but was informed that no live representatives were available. The user expressed a desire to speak with a representative and questioned if the office was closed.

The user, Chandra, called after hours requesting to speak with a representative to obtain a copy of their contract, the amount, and details about the technician's work and the unit to be installed. The agent informed the user that a team member will contact them on the next business day to assist with these requests. The call ended with the user expressing thanks and no further requests.
